title: callicarpa fulvohirsuta
intro: Callicarpa fulvohirsuta, also known as the Purple Fruit Vine, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family, native to Borneo and Sumatra. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Callicarpa fulvohirsuta include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and fruits are prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or dried for medicinal purposes.
